Tasmannia lanceolata has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. 

The bioactive constituents of Tasmannia lanceolata include polyphenols, flavonoids, and essential oils, particularly the compound polygodial, which has been shown to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
